text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka has managed to leave quite a
mark on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We get together to watch the recording of her
debut race.

text_block_list.name: Racing Commentator
text_block_list.text:
"Now, what does Silence Suzuka have in store for
us today?"

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, this really takes me back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka has been head and shoulders
above the rest since back then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In these past three years, her talent has become
legendary.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: We've gone through so much together.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I don't know...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I haven't changed much these three
years.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've seen her progress in each race with my own
eyes. How can she think she hasn't changed?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I've always loved running. It's almost the only
thing I ever think of.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Or rather, I've always been fixated on getting into
the lead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has a point. While we've encountered many
ups and downs, at the end of the day, she's still
the same Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her desire to see the view from the front of the
race remains. It's what motivates her to run.
choice_data_list: But that's one of your strengths.
But that's one of your strengths.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, I think so too.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So long as I continue to run my own way, nothing
needs to change.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. But I suppose I've grown in the way I think
about things.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her debut race, that she's only been
half-watching, has reached its end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We catch a glimpse of her in the footage smiling
proudly.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I was so happy that day.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And I can't wait to see how my running evolves
from here on.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, this is really just the
beginning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says this all to herself, then turns to look at
me once more.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I look forward to seeing what we can do in
the future, Trainer.
